home_description: Bitcoin ndi ndalama zabwino zomwe zikumanga dziko labwino. Bitcoin yateteza ufulu wa anthu, yapulumutsa anthu ku kukwera kwa mitengo, yathandiza alimi akomweko, yachepetsa kutulutsa kuchokera ku kufukula mafuta, ndi zambiri.
home_intro: Bitcoin ndi ndalama zabwino zomwe zikumanga dziko labwino. Dinani pa gulu pansipa kuti muphunzire momwe Bitcoin imapangitsira kukhala bwino, kapena yambani kumavina kuti mufufuze.
